case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. HENRY CHENG

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHENG, HENRY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-04-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, HENRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, HENRY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $60.50) SERVED DEC-15-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, HENRY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
